headline: Nasdaq + S&P at records; Iran/Hormuz risk keeps oil/inflation tail risk live
summary: Top risk: US–Iran conflict + Hormuz shipping uncertainty driving oil volatility and inflation expectations.
Malaysia: Bursa Malaysia closed May 27 (Aidiladha); BEA releases GDP (2nd est) + Personal Income & Outlays (Apr; includes PCE) on May 28 US time.

market_pulse.label: Market mode
market_pulse.detail: Nasdaq and S&P hit records; Dow lagged. Oil/war headlines remain the regime risk.

market_pulse.label: Rates / inflation channel
market_pulse.detail: AP reported Treasury yields eased on hopes of Iran de-escalation; official daily series lag latest session.

market_pulse.label: Portfolio impact
market_pulse.detail: Semis/AI bid supports TSM/SMH sensitivity; LLY financing/filing ties to Centessa acquisition terms.

market_pulse.label: Telegram
market_pulse.detail: Daily title list updated for 2026-05-27; send via scripts/send-telegram-digest.py.

alerts.title: Iran strikes / Hormuz shipping risk keeps oil shock tail risk high
alerts.detail: US reported 'self-defense' strikes in southern Iran (missile launch sites / minelaying boats). Oil moves remain headline-driven.

alerts.title: Source health: official daily yield/spot datasets lag the latest session
alerts.detail: Official daily sources checked (e.g., FRED/EIA pages) showed last-updated data through May 22; latest-session official levels unavailable.

warning_rules: Send Telegram if SPY or QQQ closes down 2%+ or VIX spikes 15%+ from prior close.
Send Telegram if any core holding has a thesis-breaking filing, earnings miss, guidance cut, regulator action, or major accident.
Send Telegram if 10Y yield moves 15bp+ in one session and rate-sensitive quality names are under pressure.
Send Telegram if TSM, LLY, MSFT, CEG, ETN, ANET, VRTX, SMH, or key Malaysia names move 5%+ with verified news.
Send Telegram if SEC EDGAR publishes a relevant new 13F, S-1, 8-K, 6-K, or major insider/PTR filing tied to tracked names.

rules: Send the daily title digest every morning even when there is no urgent alert.
Put warning or critical items at the top with [WARNING] or [CRITICAL].
Include war/geopolitics, macro/rates, oil, gas, copper, broader commodities, FX, equities, portfolio names, Malaysia market, and major earnings or filings.
Keep each item to one title plus one short impact tag. No long article summaries in Telegram.
If the message is too long for Telegram, send the top digest and attach/link telegram-news.txt for the full list.
